heading: Enlisted grades and ratings: authority to establish
label: 8213 Enlisted grades and ratings: authority to establish
text: The Secretary of the Navy may establish such enlisted grades and ratings as are necessary for the proper administration of the Navy and the Marine Corps.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6013.34 U.S.C. 176(proviso), .June 4, 1920, ch. 228, § 741 Stat. 836(less 1st sentence, and less proviso of 2d sentence).34 U.S.C. 34(1st par. under “Hospital Corps”, less 1st sentence, and less proviso of 2d sentence), ; , .Aug. 29, 1916, ch. 41739 Stat. 572Aug. 4, 1947, ch. 459, § 301(a)61 Stat. 738The words “in his discretion” and “of the enlisted personnel” are omitted as surplusage. The words “Navy and the Marine Corps” are substituted for the words “naval service”.
